kudos.label: Recognition movement
kudos.description:
NEW AT SAA 2025
A colleague recognition and appreciation activity — happening for the first time for all Sunners. The activity will be launched in November 2025, encouraging Sun* members to share recognition and appreciation messages on the system announced by the organizing committee. This will serve as material for the Heads Council to reference when selecting award recipients.

paragraphs.0:
Facing the rapidly changing landscape of the AI era and ever-increasing customer demands, Sun* chooses a strategy of capability diversification — not only striving to become elite in its own field, but also aiming for a higher goal where every Sunner is a "problem-solver", an expert at resolving every issue and finding solutions to every challenge of projects, customers, and society.
Inspired by the diversity of capabilities, flexible development potential, and the spirit of going deeper to break through in the AI era, "Root Further" was chosen as the official theme of the Sun* Annual Awards 2025 ceremony.
Beyond its surface meaning, "Root Further" is the journey we take to continuously reach further, root deeper, and touch the hidden "geological" layers to survive, rise, and nurture the ever-burning passion for creating value that defines every Sun* member. Borrowing the image of roots continuously driving deep into the earth, forcefully weaving through each layer of "sediment" to absorb the finest nutrients, Sun* members are also "absorbing" nourishment from the era and market challenges to reinvent themselves daily, expanding capabilities and firmly "rooting" into the AI era — a completely new, complex, and unpredictable "geological" layer, yet one that converges countless potentials and opportunities.
paragraphs.1:
Before the storm, only trees with strong enough roots can stand firm. An organization with individuals confident in their diverse capabilities, ready to create and embrace challenges, and in control of change is an organization that not only stands strong amid turbulence, but also exploits every advantage to conquer the challenges of the times. More than just the name of a new chapter in the organization's development journey, "Root Further" is also a word of encouragement, motivating each of us to dare to believe in ourselves, dare to go deeper, unlock all potential, dare to break limits, dare to become the most versatile and excellent version of ourselves. Because in the AI era, capability diversity and harnessing the power of the times are the essential prerequisites for longevity.
No one knows in advance how many mysterious "geological" layers lie hidden in the depths of the technology industry and modern markets. What we do know is that when "Root Further" has become the spirit at our roots, we will not be fearful, but instead feel ever more excited before any uncharted territory on the journey forward. Because we always believe that within those very boundless realms, countless wonders and opportunities to soar are waiting for us.

rootFurther.proverb:
"A tree with deep roots fears no storm"
 (Cây sâu bén rễ, bão giông chẳng nề - English Proverb)
